logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync script and monitoring
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "User wants me to run a specific Jira script with given filter and view IDs.",
        "The script takes 5-15 minutes, so I need to use the output runtime to wait for completion.",
        "I'll monitor the debug log up to 10 times as instructed.",
        "On completion/failure, I need to send appropriate notifications using the notify script.",
        "First, let me start the Jira reader script in the background with output runtime."
    ],
    "headline": "Starting Jira sync script and monitoring",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "output",
        "session": 1,
        "reset": true,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904"
    }
}

thoughts: User wants me to run a specific Jira script with given filter and view IDs.
The script takes 5-15 minutes, so I need to use the output runtime to wait for completion.
I'll monitor the debug log up to 10 times as instructed.
On completion/failure, I need to send appropriate notifications using the notify script.
First, let me start the Jira reader script in the background with output runtime.
